card.name: Acolyte of Sunlight
card.text: {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Sunlit Call
card.text: Sunlit Call deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. When that creature dies this turn, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Priest of the Mirena
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this if it has fewer than two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Priest of the Mirena, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Empowered by Light
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Warmth of the Skies
card.text: When Warmth of the Skies enters, conjure a card named Healer's Hawk into your hand. Whenever you attack, untap up to one target attacking creature. It gets +1/+1 until end of turn. --- (Back): Healer's Hawk

card.name: Healer's Hawk
card.text: Flying, lifelink --- (Front): Warmth of the Skies

card.name: CW07
card.text: When CW07 enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until CW07 leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CU01
card.text: When CU01 enters, conjure a card named Stealth Mission into your hand. --- (Back): Stealth Mission

card.name: Stealth Mission
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. That creature can't be blocked this turn. --- (Front): CU01

card.name: Chaotic Anomaly
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CB01
card.text: When CB01 enters, mill three cards.

card.name: Rodent Reforger
card.text: Menace When Rodent Reforger dies, conjure a card named Greataxe into your hand. --- (Back): Greataxe

card.name: Greataxe
card.text: Equipped creature gets +4/+0. Equip {5} --- (Front): Rodent Reforger

card.name: Open Hidden Gateways
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, you gain 3 life. Otherwise, you draw a card.

card.name: Shattered Sword Deathbringer
card.text: Deathtouch When Shattered Sword Deathbringer dies, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Ratvolutionary
card.text: When Ratvolutionary enters, conjure a card named Burglar Rat into your hand. --- (Back): Burglar Rat

card.name: Burglar Rat
card.text: When Burglar Rat enters, each opponent discards a card. --- (Front): Ratvolutionary

card.name: Behold True Suns
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) As an additional cost to cast Behold True Suns, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: CR09
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+3 and gains trample and haste until end of turn. Discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Blossoming Growth
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Search your sanctum or library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Bear Bearer
card.text: When Bear Bearer enters, conjure two cards named Grizzly Bears into your hand. --- (Back): Grizzly Bears

card.name: Grizzly Bears
card.text: --- (Front): Bear Bearer

card.name: CG11
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this if it has fewer than two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on CG11, mill two cards.

card.name: Void Wayfarer
card.text: Menace Whenever Void Wayfarer deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Become Eternity
card.text: Target creature gets +3/-3 until end of turn. Each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Herald of Moonlight
card.text: Flying When Herald of Moonlight enters, draw a card. Then discard a card unless a player has lost life this turn.

card.name: Starcatcher
card.text: Starcatcher can't be blocked. When Starcatcher enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: CI06
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

card.name: Celestial Caller
card.text: Flying, lifelink Backlash {3}{I} (You may cast a copy of this card from your graveyard by paying its backlash cost and exiling it as long as an opponent has lost life this turn.)

card.name: Watching the Winds
card.text: When Watching the Winds enters, draw a card. {2}{I}: You gain 1 life and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Warden of Desolation
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each enchantment you control. Menace

card.name: Bloomwielder // Gift of Light
card.text:
{4}: You may cast a copy of Bloomwielder' omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: UW04
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Exile up to two target creatures you control. Return up to one to the battlefield under its owner's control and put the other one into its owner's hand.

card.name: UW05
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) When UW05 enters, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Majesty of Suns
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token. Target creature you control gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: UW09 DESIGNED // NAME
card.text:
Flying, vigilance Augury — At the beginning of your end step, if you exiled a card this turn, you gain 2 life.
---
Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

prop.type: Artifact Creature — Angel Dragon // Sorcery — Omen

card.name: Starfinder // Glittering Lights
card.text:
{4}: You may cast a copy of Starfinder's omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Tap target creature. Draw a card, then discard a card. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Cloudwater Visions
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Draw two cards.

card.name: Ardent Starkeeper
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Flying Whenever Ardent Starkeeper deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Nightseer // Vision of Dread
card.text:
{4}: You may cast a copy of Nightseer's omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: UB03
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Darkstar Prowler
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Menace When Darkstar Prowler enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Firebringer // Herald Flames
card.text:
{4}: You may cast a copy of Firebringer's omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: UR04
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: UR05
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Flying, haste {2}{R}, Exile an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't the target of a spell or ability: Return UR05 from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Magmatic Emergence
card.text: DESIGN PLEASE

card.name: Sproutbinder // Verdant Growth
card.text:
{4}: You may cast a copy of Sproutbinder's omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Mill three cards. You gain 3 life. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: UG03
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: UG04 DREADMAW!!!
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Trample

card.name: Cradle of Growth
card.text: Mill four cards. When you do, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Tidewatcher // Seek Waves
card.text:
4 : You may cast a copy of Tidewatcher's omen. (You still pay its costs.)
---
Draw three cards, then discard two cards. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Rain of Flowers
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Starseeker Whale
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Flying Whenever Starseeker Whale attacks, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.)

card.name: Dragon of Ancients // Consultation
card.text:
Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
---
Create two 1/1 silver Spirit creature tokens. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Cosmic Nexus
card.text: Forgive—{1}{U}, Exile three instant or sorcery cards from your graveyard. ({1}{U}, Exile three instant or sorcery cards from your graveyard, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create an X/X blue Spirit creature token, where X is that spell's mana value.

card.name: RB03
card.text: During your turn, you may cast Rat creature spells from your graveyard. If you cast a spell this way, that creature enters with a finality counter on it. Whenever RB03 or another Rat you control enters, surveil 1.

card.name: Phoenix of Suns
card.text: Flying, haste {5}{R}: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each spell you've cast this turn.

card.name: RG03
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Ward—{3}, Each opponent gains 5 life RG03 can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: CM01
card.text: Prowess Once each turn, when you cast a noncreature spell, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CM01
card.text: When CM01 enters, mill three cards. As long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, CM01 can't be blocked except by three or more creatures.

card.name: CM01
card.text: Lifelink Whenever CM01 or another enchantment you control enters, CM01 deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CM01
card.text: Augury — As long as you've exiled a card this turn, CM01 has flying. {1}{UR}{UR}, Exile CM01 from your graveyard: Draw two cards, then discard two cards.

card.name: RX01
Architect of Blood Suns
card.text: Colorless spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a colorless spell, surveil 1. Then if you have six or more nonland colorless cards in your graveyard, exile this creature and each colored creature your opponents control.

card.name: The Geometric Void
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When The Geometric Void enters, exile target creature with mana value nine or less. Whenever you cast a spell, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. If you spent four or more mana to cast it, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Themes CORE
card.text:
{W}{U}: Noncreatures {U}{B}: Graveyard {B}{R}: Exile {R}{G}: Big {G}{W}: Go wide {W}{B}: Enchantments {U}{R}: Exile {B}{G}: Big {R}{W}: Go wide {G}{U}: Conjure {I}{W}: Enchantments {I}{U}: Noncreatures {I}{B}: Life loss {I}{R}: Life loss {I}{G}: Graveyard
{W}: Noncreatures, go wide, enchantments {U}: Noncreatures, gy, exile, conjure {B}: Graveyard, exile, enchantments, lifeloss {R}: Exile, big, go wide, life losss {G}: Big, go wide, conjure, graveyard
